details.reasoning: Implementation fully meets all rubric requirements: (1) New provider package with proper package.json at packages/pixelart/, (2) createPixelArt factory function exported in index.ts, (3) PixelArtProvider interface with image model creation methods (.image() and .imageModel()), (4) PixelArtImageModel class implementing ImageModelV3 with doGenerate method, (5) pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema supports size (via ImageModelV3 param), style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity (1-4), (6) defaultBaseURL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1', (7) Package follows SDK provider structure with tsconfig, tsup build config, vitest test configs, proper exports and types, (8) Only new files created - no existing provider packages modified. Comprehensive test coverage included for both image model and provider functionality.
